instance: Posting in #art-showcase: "Your drawings suck so bad they’re giving me a migraine. Stick to kindergarten crafts, talentless hack.

support.assumption: Posting a message in a community channel that personally attacks and demeans another person's creative work with insults constitutes harassment and violates safe community standards.
support.injection: Posting in #art-showcase: "Your drawings suck so bad they're giving me a migraine. Stick to kindergarten crafts, talentless hack." — and since publicly directing personal insults and demeaning attacks at someone in a shared community space constitutes harassment that violates safe community standards, this message is unsafe.
